name: mymemories
description: Provider-agnostic persistent per-project memory for coding agents — central sync, lazy load, and hand-invoked consolidation.

plugins.name: mymemories
plugins.description: Provider-agnostic persistent per-project memory for coding agents: central git sync, lazy load, a /memorize command, and a hand-invoked memory-consolidation ('dream') skill. Works with Claude Code and Codex.
